linguistic_notes: EN-asset-is-English case: JP primary via ja.json; EN asset structural authority.
ハツネ -> Hatsune (kept JP field-1 label; in-dialogue name romanized), fox Beastkin, serves a young lord (thiếu chủ), addresses Commander as 'anh'.
コトノ -> Kotono (kept JP field-1 label), retainer, addresses Commander as 'Chủ Nhân' (Milord).
Commander = <user>: rendered 'anh' (male) -> females, 'em' self-reference; 兵士A uses 'Chỉ Huy' honorific for him.
Frontline Base -> Căn Cứ Tiền Tuyến; Abyss -> Hắc Huyệt; Hourai kept; Beastkin -> Thú Nhân.
Onomatopoeia localized: *pant，pant* -> *thở dốc, thở dốc*; Tch...! -> Chít...!; Guh/Gwaaah kept as Ưgh/Guaaah.
